programmes.show_description: After a bitter break-up, a man claims his intoxicated ex-girlfriend vandalised his motorcycle. She accuses him of a violent assault. S10, Ep230
A landlord and tenant dispute the cost of locating and capturing a missing pet python. S10, Ep231
A golf cart driver in a senior gated community claims a motorist blew a stop sign and caused a wreck; she says he was the one driving recklessly. S23, Ep195
A man claims his ex-lover threatened and harassed him; his car was allegedly damaged in an attempt to escape gunfire. S23, Ep196
A man's new rental property is burned to the ground in a California forest fire; he is sued by his previous landlord for eviction fees. S23, Ep197
A widower claims he started a cleaning business with his girlfriend but that she allegedly neglected to pay him. S23, Ep198
A new tenant allegedly disturbs the peace when his move-in time is adjusted; the Judge tells the landlord to 'kiss the carpet that he didn't move in!' S23, Ep199
A man sues his former business partner for the return of two Mercedes and claims he was conned in an out-of-state deal. S23, Ep200
A disgruntled employee sneaks into a store to steal clothing off the rack from her former boss who allegedly owes her money. S23, Ep201
An angry student claims a co-worker repaid a loan with a bad cheque. Ex-roommates clash over a stolen Playstation, damaged walls and unpaid rent. S10, Ep225
Charges of disorderly conduct in a club land ex-lovers in jail and fighting over payment of bail. Family drama escalates when sisters become co-workers. S10, Ep226
A frozen body wrapped in sheets is found near Anchorage, Alaska, by hikers and a salvaged fingerprint and a tuft of red carpet quickly uncover the killer. S9, Ep24
Nancy Ludwig is found stabbed to death in her hotel room in Detroit. Her death is similar to another woman, Margaret Eby, who was murdered five years earlier. S9, Ep25
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A victim is unsuspectingly poisoned with arsenic, but how did it enter her system? And, was it purely accidental or intended? S9, Ep8
Using a meticulous reconstructive process, it's not long before a killer is brought to justice. S9, Ep9
A forensic psychiatrist is brought in to help distinguish fact from fiction after a woman's husband is shot dead. S9, Ep10
Vital clues are gleaned from the body of a 16-year-old girl found nine months after she disappeared. Will the killer be found? S9, Ep11
When a young woman falls from a cliff to her death, forensic examination of photographs from the scene uncover a sinister truth. S9, Ep12
A young woman's investigation into the disappearance of her mother uncovers a shocking family secret. S9, Ep13
Noriella Santos was 19 and had everything going for her - until she was charged with murder. But did her abusive boyfriend make her an unwitting accomplice? S30, Ep13
A famed L.A. hairstylist is killed in his backyard - was it a robbery gone wrong by thugs called the knock-knock burglars or a twisted plot no one could believe? S30, Ep14
Before Rhonda and her boyfriend Stephen headed to the Columbia River Gorge, she joked to a friend that Nichols was either 'going to propose or kill me'. S30, Ep15
Investigators track a hospital worker, who's stolen over one million pounds worth of surgical equipment; and a student nurse swindles thousands from the NHS to fund a luxury lifestyle. S1, Ep1
Alex and Maggie Murdaugh lived a lavish lifestyle, at their sprawling country estate in Moselle. In 2011, that dynasty would begin to crumble. S1, Ep2
David Tronnes meets Shanti Cooper online and moves to Orlando, purchasing a house in cash. In 2018, David finds Shanti unresponsive. It is clear this is not an accidental death. S1, Ep3
A woman sues her fiance's brother for allegedly reneging on car payments. A new homeowner claims the previous tenant had no right to enter her house. S10, Ep197
Dog owners demand payback from a kennel after their puppy allegedly comes back home untrained and in poor health. S10, Ep198
A woman insists that her ex-lover helps cover the medical costs of the birth of their child. S10, Ep200
Family drama escalates when a young man sues his girlfriend's mother for illegally disposing of his property. S10, Ep199
Family members deny breaking into the home they were evicted from and vandalizing property. S10, Ep201
A man sues his ex-wife for allegedly stealing his BMW and for damages he claims she caused during a fit of rage. S10, Ep202
A woman sues a man for allegedly selling her a stolen jet-ski. After a bitter-break up, a woman expects her ex-lover to pay for DUI fines and shared holiday shopping. S10, Ep203
A woman is accused of harassment during a town hall meeting to discuss a memorial for a soldier killed in Fallujah. S10, Ep204
A woman sues for the cost of childcare after taking in a troubled friend's child. A hairdresser is accused of ruining a woman's hair and her self-esteem. S10, Ep205
A mother and daughter admit that they have had fights in the past, but go after their landlord for an allegedly illegal lockout and destruction of property. S23, Ep167
A father says he paid extra support to prevent his daughter from being homeless; he sues the mother of his child after she allegedly turns the girl against him. S23, Ep166
A man accidentally steps on a woman's 12-year-old Pomeranian; she claims he was drunk and devoid of empathy. S23, Ep168
A car sale goes terribly wrong when the vehicle is allegedly stolen and the seller's overseas trip complicates rightful ownership. S23, Ep169
A photographer is accused of preying on the pride of parents with a business model designed to drum up business by offering free 'child modelling' photos. S23, Ep170
A small boy doesn't stand a chance when the pit bull he is walking drags him across the yard to attack another dog. S23, Ep171
A young man moves in with a woman who own a German Shepherd Husky; after being attacked, he moves out. S23, Ep173
A fight over friends with benefits ends with a catfight at a gas station, a six-night prison stay, and menacing, texted photos of guns. S23, Ep174
A young man's gossip about an alleged affair between his boss and a female acquaintance lead to a restraining order. S23, Ep175
A woman claims vulgar, threatening texts, alleged stalking and heavy breathing left her too terrified to show up in court. S23, Ep176
Alex and Maggie Murdaugh lived a lavish lifestyle, at their sprawling country estate in Moselle. In 2011, that dynasty would begin to crumble. S1, Ep2
David Tronnes meets Shanti Cooper online and moves to Orlando, purchasing a house in cash. In 2018, David finds Shanti unresponsive. It is clear this is not an accidental death. S1, Ep3
Investigators turn to satellite surveillance to track down the abductor of a young girl. When they find her, a hidden fingerprint helps solve the case. S6, Ep25
When a state trooper is attacked, investigators uncover a 'signature' that links the assault to the murder of a young woman. S6, Ep26
When a woman vanishes under mysterious circumstances, investigators use cat hairs and insects to track her down. S6, Ep27
When the wife of a successful attorney is found shot in the head, DNA testing on blood spatters helps to solve the case. S6, Ep28
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A persistent investigator finally uncovers the truth in a ten year old case of an elderly couple's murder. S9, Ep14
A street fight that claimed the life of a wrestling champion led to a murder trial. S9, Ep15
Cutting-edge forensic science helps solve real crimes. Devon Guzman's murder was set up to look like suicide, but investigators uncover the shocking truth. S9, Ep16
A man disappears one year after starting an affair with his friend's wife. Fifteen years later, a hobbyist with a metal detector helps police find new evidence. S9, Ep17
The body of a co-ed was found by police who had no idea who would want this girl dead. Her killer was found thanks to a unique fibre on the victim's clothing. S9, Ep18
A go-go dancer tells her family she needs to get away and vanishes for 20 years, but a phone call from out of the blue reveals the real story. S9, Ep19
A man suspected in his girlfriend's murder swears he didn't do it - can his Fitbit prove he's innocent? S30, Ep16
A woman suddenly vanishes and is not reported missing for months - her hairdresser pushes for answers - is she dead or alive? S30, Ep18
An audacious scam cons a group of NHS hospitals out of over twelve and a half million pounds. S1, Ep2
A locksmith scams a London hospital out of nearly half a million pounds. S1, Ep3
Abraham Shakespeare won the lottery in 2006. Dee Dee Moore befriended him, gained control of his assets, and murdered him in 2009. S1, Ep4
When William Saunderson-Smith was found bludgeoned to death in 2011, police discovered cash stuffed in bags and sixty-seven different mobile phones. S1, Ep5
A man accuses his best friend of damaging his car and flirting with his wife while he was in prison. S10, Ep206
A man sues his stepmother for harassment after she demands payback for an alleged car loan. Parents dispute damages after an expensive violin is damaged. S10, Ep207
Feuding ex-fiances dispute the cost of daycare for their toddler. A graduate student is devastated when her Siberian Husky is allegedly `lost' by her pet sitter. S10, Ep208
A woman claims a father of four children threatened to sell her belongings while she was in rehab. S10, Ep209
A teenager claims he was brutally attacked while trying to defend his little brother from a local bully. S10, Ep210
Angry mothers dispute underage drinking and the car accident that ensued after their teenagers got drunk at a party. S10, Ep211
A woman claims her cousin stole her identity and racked up a hefty phone bill. A teenager insists she owes nothing to her ex-roommate. S10, Ep212
A teenager charges an ex-classmate with street racing and wrecking her mum's car. A woman claims her internet boyfriend from Nigeria scammed her and her sister. S10, Ep213
A woman pays thousands for her friend's divorce attorney and demands that she be paid back. A mother claims the cell phone she bought online for her teenager was stolen. S10, Ep214
A property manager vehemently denies having an inappropriate relationship with his ex-wife's attorney when an Ex tenant sues him after being assaulted. S23, Ep180
A woman files an allegedly malicious complaint to the Better Business Bureau when her ice cream renovation does not go as planned. S23, Ep178
The Judge utters one of her most infamous' Judyisms when a marina owner offers up a fishy story about a pontoon boat crash. S23, Ep179
A Judge Judy fan serves 12 days in jail and says he returned home to find an ex-girlfriend had robbed him. S23, Ep177
A woman accuses her estranged daughter-in law of wreaking havoc on their family when she up and leaves the state; Judge Judy asks her to do the right thing. S23, Ep181
An Idaho rodeo takes a walk on the wild side when young, intoxicated campers start punching the daylights out of each other. S23, Ep182
